texto: It's super important that people use their significant buying power to pull companies like Ferrari and show them there is a market for sustainable fuel. So many other car companies would take notice if Ferrari made headway on this measure.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Petter Stordalen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a negocios. O trecho “It's super important that people use their significant buying power to pull companies like Ferrar…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que negocios, power, people pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de people e measure.
